title: iberis soyeri subsp. violletii
intro: Iberis soyeri subsp. violletii, also known as rock candy or sweet rocket, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the cress family (Brassicaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of isothiocyanates. The medicinal properties of Iberis soyeri subsp. violletii are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
